states.deadline: Full application portal open June 1 – June 22, 2026 (9am). Year 2 LOI expected early fall 2026.

rfpOpportunities.andorNote: AK's geographic challenge makes virtual care essential — ThinkAndor®'s remote monitoring and virtual rounding are critical for Alaska Native and rural Alaskan hospitals.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Alaska's rural-frontier-tribal care gaps are the exact use case Psynergy was built for. Virtual physicians and APPs serve remote communities that cannot recruit on-site providers.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: RHTP Request for Applications (RFA) — Multiple Initiatives
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Colorado's technology and value-based care priorities align with ThinkAndor®'s EHR-integrated AI documentation and workflow platform.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Colorado's workforce initiative is a direct fit for Psynergy's virtual clinical staffing model — augmenting rural clinical teams without requiring local hiring.

rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Tennessee's rural hospital technology focus aligns with ThinkAndor®'s ambient AI documentation and virtual care platform — reducing clinician burden in rural facilities.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Psynergy's virtual staffing model directly addresses Tennessee's rural workforce gaps — APPs and virtual RNs can extend capacity without local hiring.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Healthy Hometowns — Combat Cancer Health Hub RFP + Maternal Health Hub RFI
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Iowa's Combat Cancer Health Hub could use ThinkAndor®'s remote monitoring and predictive analytics for chronic disease management across rural communities.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Iowa's Maternal Health Hub and workforce initiatives are a strong fit for Psynergy's virtual clinical staffing — virtual APPs and care coordination for maternal care.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: ASO Support RFP + Center for Rural Health Sustainability & Innovation (CRHSI) RFP
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: NM's Rural Health Data Hub and technology initiatives align directly with ThinkAndor®'s AI infrastructure and EHR integration capabilities.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: NM's Healthy Horizons initiative expanding specialty and behavioral health access is a direct match for Psynergy's virtual specialist staffing.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: RFP #26-09RHT-022 — Workforce Stakeholder & PM + Round 2 (Digital Health, Doula, Caregiver)
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: ThinkAndor®'s ambient AI and virtual care infrastructure is a direct fit for SD's digital health modernization round.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Psynergy's workforce expertise and virtual clinical staffing maps directly to both the workforce PM RFP and the doula/caregiver support round.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Rural Health Innovation Fund — NC ROOTS Hubs + Additional Initiative RFPs
rfpOpportunities.status: NC ROOTS contracts finalizing June 2026 — next RFPs TBD
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: NC's Rural Innovation Fund prioritizes behavioral health access and technology — ThinkAndor® virtual consultation routing and ambient documentation apply directly.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: NC codified behavioral health access as a key RHTP pillar. Psynergy's virtual behavioral health provider staffing addresses the specific gaps NC's law targets.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Multiple RFPs via WEBS — Hospital Innovation, Tribal Health, Disease Prevention
rfpOpportunities.status: Active now on WEBS — registration required
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: WA's hospital innovation and technology initiatives align directly with ThinkAndor®'s deployed capabilities. Prior rural health system deployments (Ballad Health) provide proof of concept.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: WA's Tribal health and workforce initiatives are a natural fit for Psynergy's flexible virtual staffing — particularly for tribal facilities lacking on-site specialty staff.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Multiple RFPs — Workforce, Technology, Rural Hospital Support
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: WV's rural Appalachian network faces extreme staffing shortfalls — ThinkAndor® virtual nursing and ambient AI are purpose-built for this. Ballad Health (WV/TN) already deployed.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: WV is among the most acute rural workforce shortage states. Psynergy's virtual physician/APP model directly addresses WV's documented clinical capacity gaps.

rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Montana's technology innovation and community health initiatives align with ThinkAndor®'s rural hospital virtual care platform and ambient documentation tools.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Montana's workforce development and sustainable access initiatives match Psynergy's virtual clinical staffing — particularly for frontier communities with extreme provider shortages.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Rural Texas Strong — Technology & Patient Portal Initiative
rfpOpportunities.status: Procurement postings via GovDelivery — monitor HHSC Grants Page
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Texas's consumer-facing health portal and remote monitoring technology initiatives are a direct match for ThinkAndor®'s patient engagement and ambient care capabilities.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Texas has the largest rural population in the nation — Psynergy's virtual physician/APP model is purpose-built for the scale and geographic spread of Texas rural health.

rfpOpportunities.andorNote: ThinkAndor® is purpose-built for RHIT criteria: AI, remote monitoring, rural telehealth, and tech-enabled care delivery. Strong KLAS and Frost & Sullivan validation.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Psynergy's virtual workforce and AI-enabled triage services directly address rural technology and workforce capacity — exactly what Nevada's RHIT grant funds.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: RHTP 2026: Technology, Prevention & Workforce Capacity RFA — Next Round
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: NJ's explicit 'Advancing Technology' focus directly matches ThinkAndor®. NJ published a Vendor Resource Directory — Andor should seek listing.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: NJ's workforce capacity track is a fit, though NJ has less extreme rural workforce shortages than other states.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Multiple Initiative RFPs — Workforce, Technology, Chronic Disease
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Ohio's chronic disease and technology priorities align with ThinkAndor®'s remote monitoring and predictive analytics for rural population health.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Ohio's workforce and chronic disease initiatives benefit from Psynergy's virtual clinical team model — especially remote monitoring for high-burden chronic conditions.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Catalyst Awards RFGP — Next Round (Awards July 2026)
rfpOpportunities.status: Current round closed May 26, 2026 — award decisions July 2026
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Oregon's technology innovation and access priorities align with ThinkAndor®'s virtual care and ambient AI capabilities for rural facilities.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Oregon's rural workforce shortage and specialty access gaps match Psynergy's virtual staffing model exactly.
